panels.description: scope: all spend incl. unallocated — reads cost_facts (attribution lags rollup timer + nightly sweep)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 2) AS value FROM cost_facts WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Total Spend

panels.description: scope: attributed share of all cost_facts, trailing 24h excluded per sweep-lag rule (A5)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN entity_type != '' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_usd), 0), 1) AS value FROM cost_facts WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

panels.title: Attribution % (excl. trailing 24h)

panels.description: scope: attributed cost on entities with no value for the selected $facet1 key

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(cf.cost_usd), 2) AS value FROM cost_facts cf WHERE $__timeFilter(cf.timestamp) AND cf.entity_type != '' AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags_resolved etr JOIN tags t ON t.id = etr.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND etr.entity_type = cf.entity_type AND etr.entity_id = cf.entity_id AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 1 FROM workunits wu WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' AND cf.entity_type = 'workunit' AND wu.id = cf.entity_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 1 FROM outcomes o WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' AND cf.entity_type = 'outcome' AND o.id = cf.entity_id
)

panels.title: Untagged under $facet1

panels.description: number of distinct tag values for the selected facet key active in this window

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outcomes) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tag_value) FROM tags WHERE tag_key = '${facet1:raw}' AND retired = 0) END AS value

panels.title: Distinct $facet1 Values

panels.description: scope: all messages in window (excl. trailing 24h). Shows cost by confidence class: direct (temporal_join), inferred (lead fallback), recovered (transcript/gap/warmup/synthesis), unallocated.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.method = 'temporal_join' THEN tl.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) AS direct,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.method LIKE 'temporal_join%' AND ua.method != 'temporal_join' THEN tl.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inferred,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.method IN ('transcript_focus_recovery','admin_warmup','gap_recovery','synthesized_outcome') THEN tl.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) AS recovered,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.method = 'unallocated' THEN tl.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unallocated
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl ON tl.message_id = ua.message_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp) AND tl.timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

panels.title: Attribution Confidence

panels.description: scope: all spend incl. unallocated. Conservation guaranteed — sum of first-stage outflows equals window total. Node labels prefixed with stage key to prevent DAG cycle errors when facets share values. Top 10 per stage + (other). Multi-valued keys split cost fractionally. (unallocated)=bright red; (untagged @key)=grey.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT source, target, ROUND(SUM(value), 2) AS value FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN CONCAT('${facet1:raw}', ': (unallocated)')
         ELSE CONCAT('${facet1:raw}', ': ', COALESCE(r1.tag_value, '(untagged)')) END AS source,
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN CONCAT('${facet2:raw}', ': (unallocated)')
         ELSE CONCAT('${facet2:raw}', ': ', COALESCE(r2.tag_value, '(untagged)')) END AS target,
    cr.cost_usd * COALESCE(r1.w, 1) * COALESCE(r2.w, 1) AS value
  FROM cost_facts cr
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
           1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
    FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
    WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
    WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM outcomes o
    WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
  ) r1 ON r1.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND r1.entity_id = cr.entity_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
           1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
    FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
    WHERE '${facet2:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet2:raw}'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
    WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM outcomes o
    WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
  ) r2 ON r2.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND r2.entity_id = cr.entity_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
    AND ('${filter1:raw}' = 'All' OR COALESCE(r1.tag_value, '(untagged)') = '${filter1:raw}' OR (cr.entity_type = '' AND '${filter1:raw}' = '(unallocated)'))
) raw
GROUP BY source, target
HAVING value > 0
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 120

SELECT source, target, ROUND(SUM(value), 2) AS value FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN CONCAT('${facet2:raw}', ': (unallocated)')
         ELSE CONCAT('${facet2:raw}', ': ', COALESCE(r2.tag_value, '(untagged)')) END AS source,
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN CONCAT('${facet3:raw}', ': (unallocated)')
         ELSE CONCAT('${facet3:raw}', ': ', COALESCE(r3.tag_value, '(untagged)')) END AS target,
    cr.cost_usd * COALESCE(r2.w, 1) * COALESCE(r3.w, 1) AS value
  FROM cost_facts cr
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
           1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
    FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
    WHERE '${facet2:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet2:raw}'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
    WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM outcomes o
    WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
  ) r2 ON r2.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND r2.entity_id = cr.entity_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
           1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
    FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
    WHERE '${facet3:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet3:raw}'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
    WHERE '${facet3:raw}' = 'outcome'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
    FROM outcomes o
    WHERE '${facet3:raw}' = 'outcome'
  ) r3 ON r3.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND r3.entity_id = cr.entity_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
    AND ('${filter1:raw}' = 'All'
      OR (cr.entity_type = '' AND '${filter1:raw}' = '(unallocated)')
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
        WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}' AND t.tag_value = '${filter1:raw}'
          AND er.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND er.entity_id = cr.entity_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 1 FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
        WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' AND CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title) = '${filter1:raw}'
          AND cr.entity_type = 'workunit' AND wu.id = cr.entity_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 1 FROM outcomes o
        WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' AND CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title) = '${filter1:raw}'
          AND cr.entity_type = 'outcome' AND o.id = cr.entity_id
      )
      OR ('${filter1:raw}' = '(untagged)' AND cr.entity_type != '' AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
        WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
          AND er.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND er.entity_id = cr.entity_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 1 FROM workunits wu
        WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' AND cr.entity_type = 'workunit' AND wu.id = cr.entity_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 1 FROM outcomes o
        WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' AND cr.entity_type = 'outcome' AND o.id = cr.entity_id
      ))
    )
) raw
GROUP BY source, target
HAVING value > 0
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 120

panels.title: Tag Flow: $facet1 → $facet2 → $facet3

panels.description: scope: all spend incl. unallocated. Canonical tag-facet query time-bucketed. (untagged)/(unallocated) included as first-class series.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(cr.timestamp, $agg),
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x1.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS metric,
    ROUND(SUM(cr.cost_usd * COALESCE(x1.w, 1)), 2) AS cost_usd
FROM cost_facts cr
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x1 ON x1.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x1.entity_id = cr.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1, metric

panels.title: Cost by $facet1 Over Time

panels.description: scope: all spend incl. unallocated. Fractional weights for multi-valued keys — totals reconcile with Total Spend above. (unallocated)=no entity; (untagged)=entity with no value for this key.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x1.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS level_1,
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x2.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS level_2,
    ROUND(SUM(cr.cost_usd * COALESCE(x1.w, 1) * COALESCE(x2.w, 1)), 2) AS cost_usd
FROM cost_facts cr
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x1 ON x1.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x1.entity_id = cr.entity_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet2:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x2 ON x2.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x2.entity_id = cr.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
GROUP BY level_1, level_2
ORDER BY level_1, cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Cost by $facet1 → $facet2

panels.description: scope: all spend incl. unallocated. Cell totals computed in SQL with fractional weights — no footer needed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x1.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS level_1,
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x2.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS level_2,
    ROUND(SUM(cr.cost_usd * COALESCE(x1.w, 1) * COALESCE(x2.w, 1)), 2) AS cost_usd
FROM cost_facts cr
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x1 ON x1.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x1.entity_id = cr.entity_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet2:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x2 ON x2.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x2.entity_id = cr.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
GROUP BY level_1, level_2
ORDER BY level_1, cost_usd DESC

panels.title: Cost Matrix: $facet1 × $facet2

panels.description: scope: all spend incl. unallocated. Use $filter1 to narrow to a specific facet1 value.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x1.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS facet1_val,
    CASE WHEN cr.entity_type = '' THEN '(unallocated)' ELSE COALESCE(x2.tag_value, '(untagged)') END AS facet2_val,
    ROUND(SUM(cr.cost_usd * COALESCE(x1.w, 1) * COALESCE(x2.w, 1)), 2) AS cost_usd
FROM cost_facts cr
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet1:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x1 ON x1.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x1.entity_id = cr.entity_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' != 'outcome' AND t.tag_key = '${facet2:raw}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workunit', wu.id, CONCAT(wu.outcome_id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM workunits wu JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = wu.outcome_id
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'outcome', o.id, CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title), 1.0
  FROM outcomes o
  WHERE '${facet2:raw}' = 'outcome'
) x2 ON x2.entity_type = cr.entity_type AND x2.entity_id = cr.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
  AND ('${filter1:raw}' = 'All' OR COALESCE(x1.tag_value, '(untagged)') = '${filter1:raw}' OR (cr.entity_type = '' AND '${filter1:raw}' = '(unallocated)'))
GROUP BY facet1_val, facet2_val
ORDER BY facet1_val, cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Drill Table: $facet1 → $facet2 → Cost  (filter: $filter1)

panels.description: scope: all spend in cost_facts for window. Model mix by attributed cost.

targets.rawSql: SELECT model AS model, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 2) AS cost_usd FROM cost_facts WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Cost by Model

panels.description: scope: all spend in cost_facts. Model cost share trend — watch for premium model growth.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(cr.timestamp, $agg), cr.model AS metric, ROUND(SUM(cr.cost_usd), 2) AS cost_usd
FROM cost_facts cr
WHERE $__timeFilter(cr.timestamp)
GROUP BY 1, cr.model
ORDER BY 1, cr.model

panels.title: Cost by Model Over Time

panels.description: scope: immediate token ledger — cache_read_tokens / (input_tokens + cache_read_tokens). High ratio means prompt caching is effective.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(cache_read_tokens) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), 4) AS value FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio

panels.description: scope: immediate token ledger — estimated savings vs paying full input price for cache-read tokens. Per-model: cache_read_tokens × (input_price − cache_read_price). Rates per Mtok: opus-4-8 $5/$0.5, opus-4-5/6/7 $15/$1.5, sonnet-4-5/6 $3/$0.3, haiku-4-5 $0.8/$0.08, fable-5 $10/$1.0. List-price approximation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(
  cache_read_tokens *
  CASE
    WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4-8%'   THEN (0.000005  - 0.0000005)
    WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4%'     THEN (0.000015  - 0.0000015)
    WHEN model LIKE 'claude-sonnet-4%'   THEN (0.000003  - 0.0000003)
    WHEN model LIKE 'claude-haiku-4%'    THEN (0.0000008 - 0.00000008)
    WHEN model LIKE 'claude-fable-5%'    THEN (0.00001   - 0.000001)
    ELSE 0
  END
), 2) AS value
FROM token_ledger
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Cache savings vs uncached input pricing (est.)

panels.description: scope: immediate token ledger — average USD cost per message in the window

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS value FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Avg Cost / Message

panels.description: scope: immediate token ledger — message count in the window

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Total Messages

panels.description: scope: immediate token ledger — per-token-class cost reconstruction. cacheRead cost is low (1/10th input price) — its dominance is the cache dividend, not a cost concern.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $agg), 'input' AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(input_tokens * CASE WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4-8%' THEN 0.000005 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4%' THEN 0.000015 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-sonnet-4%' THEN 0.000003 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-haiku-4%' THEN 0.0000008 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-fable-5%' THEN 0.00001 ELSE 0.000015 END), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1
UNION ALL
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $agg), 'output' AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(output_tokens * CASE WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4-8%' THEN 0.000025 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4%' THEN 0.000075 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-sonnet-4%' THEN 0.000015 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-haiku-4%' THEN 0.000004 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-fable-5%' THEN 0.00005 ELSE 0.000075 END), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1
UNION ALL
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $agg), 'cacheRead' AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(cache_read_tokens * CASE WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4-8%' THEN 0.0000005 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4%' THEN 0.0000015 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-sonnet-4%' THEN 0.0000003 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-haiku-4%' THEN 0.00000008 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-fable-5%' THEN 0.000001 ELSE 0.0000015 END), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1
UNION ALL
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $agg), 'cacheWrite' AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(cache_write_tokens * CASE WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4-8%' THEN 0.00000625 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-opus-4%' THEN 0.00001875 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-sonnet-4%' THEN 0.00000375 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-haiku-4%' THEN 0.000001 WHEN model LIKE 'claude-fable-5%' THEN 0.0000125 ELSE 0.00001875 END), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cost by Token Type Over Time

panels.description: scope: immediate token ledger — rolling average cost per message. Rising trend may indicate model mix shift or context bloat.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $agg), 'cost/msg' AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 6) AS value
FROM token_ledger
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cost / Message Trend

list.label: Facet 1
list.name: facet1
list.query: SELECT 'outcome' AS tag_key UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT tag_key FROM tags WHERE retired = 0 ORDER BY tag_key

list.label: Facet 2
list.name: facet2
list.query: SELECT 'outcome' AS tag_key UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT tag_key FROM tags WHERE retired = 0 ORDER BY tag_key

list.label: Facet 3
list.name: facet3
list.query: SELECT 'outcome' AS tag_key UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT tag_key FROM tags WHERE retired = 0 ORDER BY tag_key

list.label: Filter Facet 1
list.name: filter1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tag_value FROM tags WHERE '${facet1:raw}' != 'outcome' AND tag_key = '${facet1:raw}' AND retired = 0 UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(o.id, ': ', o.title) AS tag_value FROM outcomes o WHERE '${facet1:raw}' = 'outcome' ORDER BY tag_value
